import React from 'react'; import "./about.css"; import Image from "../../assets/avatar-1.svg" const About = () => { return (

About Me

My name is Jisoo Kim and I'm a native Coloradan who likes to explore cafes every Friday. I currently work at Lockheed Martin on the Orion program, so I'll see you in on Mars!

) } export default About
